title: Media Automation Utility
tagline: Automation tool for media handling and workflow simplification — built as a practical utility project
problem: Repetitive media processing tasks — renaming, sorting, converting, and organizing files — consume time that could go toward more meaningful work.
solution: Python-based automation utility that handles common media workflow tasks. Designed for personal use and practical daily operations.
impact: In active personal use. Reduces manual file handling overhead.
